summary: Video. A 2019 DHS '#WhyISeeSay / Protect Your Every Day' PSA. Ordinary people, including a woman on a city bus and a family outside a building, speak to camera about what is worth protecting (family, community), with on-screen 'WHY' text and a closing See/Say card. It is a narrated testimonial awareness spot. It predates the second Trump administration.
notable_text: WHY / We all have something worth protecting, a why that unifies us. / Report suspicious activity to local authorities. If you see something, say something.
